title: An Act relative to firefighting water supplies and a state cistern program

abstracts.abstract: Senate, January 29 , 2026 -- The committee on Financial Services to whom was referred the petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2739) (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Michael O. Moore for legislation relative to firefighting water supplies and a state cistern program, report the accompanying bill (Senate, No. 2920).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Financial Services
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Committee recommended ought to pass and referred to the committee on Senate Ways and Means

committee on Senate Ways and Means
